case_title: FABIRANOVICH, JOHN vs. ENRIQUEZ, MARIA AMPARO et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT ENRIQUEZ, MARIA AMPARO LOPEZ, JUAN PABLO ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES AS TO DEFENDANT ENRIQUEZ, MARIA AMPARO

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FABIRANOVICH, JOHN SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JAN-09-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JAN-23-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

JUDGMENT IS REACHED BY STIPULATION. PLAINTIFF, JOHN FABIANOVICH SHALL HAVE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF 6 GLADYS STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94110. A MONEY JUDGMENT OF $1000 IS AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF, JOHN FABIANOVICH. DEFENDANTS MARIA ENRIQUEZ AND JUAN LOPEZ, BEGINNING 2-6-95 SHALL MAKE INSTALLMENTS OF $100 FOR TEN MONTHS. THEY MUST ALSO PAY THEIR RENT ON TIME WITH A TWO DAY GRACE PERIOD. THE RENT SHALL BE PAID IN CASH, CASHIER'S CHECK OR MONEY ORDER. THE RENT SHALL GO TO THE OFFICE OF ATTORNEY, MICHAEL HALL. AS OF 2-95, THE DEFENDNATS SHALL KEEP THE GARBAGE BILL CURRENT. IF THE DEFENDANTS MEET THE TERMS OF THIS AGREEMENT, THIS JUDGMENT SHALL BE VACATED AND DISMISSED. IN THE EVENT OF A DEFAULT, THERE WILL NOT BE A STAY OF EXECUTION. THE DEFENDANTS ARE THE ONLY TENANTS ON THE PREMISES OTHER THAN 3 MINOR CHILDREN. IF AN EVICTION OCCURS, DEFENDANTS MARIA ENRIQUEZ AND JUAN LOPEZ SHALL HAVE CREDIT FOR MONEY PAID. THE SECURITY DEPOSITE SHALL BE RETURNED ACCORDING TO CODE.
